> i want to isntall freebsd on hp dv9420us laptop
> i burned the install disc
> inserted
> but when it going to load the loader it just output a crazy code on the screen
> and it doesnt let me do anything like disabling acpi or other debug options

>> How-To-Repeat:
>>     
> just try to installa freebsd 6.2 on dv9420us
> i downloaded de amd64 version
>

I had the same problem with my dv9205us with amd64.  The trick is to 
just keep hitting spacebar (or maybe another key, not sure) every few 
seconds until the loader makes it past the point that it usually spews 
all that text to the screen.  It works like a charm after that.

--Jay
